name: Gale Weaver
explicitMods: +1 to Level of all Minion Skill Gems
Minions have 107% increased Critical Strike Chance
Minions have +5% to all maximum Elemental Resistances

socketedItems.secDescrText: Recalls all minions that are following you to your location, and grants them a temporary life regeneration effect.
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Fire, Physical, Guard

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. When the buff expires or is depleted, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken from the buff. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

75% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to 10% of your Armour, up to a maximum of 5000
Reflects 3270% of Damage taken from Buff as Fire Damage when Buff expires or is depleted
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: While this skill is active, supported spells will be repeatedly triggered.
explicitMods: Each Supported Spell will Trigger when its Cooldown is over
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Spells are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that are instant and have no reservation. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

name: Dire Dash
implicitMods: Drops Brittle Ground while moving, lasting 4 seconds

socketedItems.secDescrText: Summons a Carrion Golem that grants added physical damage for your non-golem minions. The Carrion Golem attacks with a series of slashes that increase in speed and damage, as well as a cascade of bone spikes, and deals more damage for each of your non-golem minions near it.
explicitMods: Golems deal 5% more Damage per Non-Golem Minion near them, up to 50%
Golems grant 29 to 43 additional Physical Damage for Non-Golem Minions
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Raises a spectral version of a defeated foe as a minion to fight for you in battle.
explicitMods: Minions have +50% to all Elemental Resistances
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports skills which create Minions.
explicitMods: Minions from Supported Skills have 20% chance to Taunt on Hit
Supported Skills have 29% increased Minion Movement Speed
Minions from Supported Skills deal 30% more Damage with Hits and Ailments to Enemies that are Near you
Minions from Supported Skills take 29% less Damage
Minions from Supported Skills are Defensive
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Animates a melee weapon or armour, attaching it to an invisible Guardian that fights by your side. Animating multiple items attaches them to the same Guardian. You cannot animate unidentified items. Cannot be used by Traps or Mines. If your Guardian dies you cannot summon an Animated Guardian again in that area.
explicitMods: Can use Items requiring up to Level 100
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Foulborn Severed in Sleep
explicitMods: Minions have +5% to Critical Strike Multiplier per Withered Debuff on Enemy
mutatedMods: Minions have +5.6% to Critical Strike Chance
flavourText: His lucky thralls dream eternal,
but we must crawl on our own.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Dive through enemies, dealing weapon damage. If dual wielding attacks with both weapons, dealing the damage of both in one hit. Only works with Daggers, Claws, and One-Handed Swords.
explicitMods: When Dual Wielding, Deals 75% Damage from each Weapon combined
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports aura skills that affect you and allies, increasing the aura's effect on allies, but preventing it from affecting you at all. Cannot support curse auras, or other auras that only affect enemies. Cannot support skills used by totems. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 40% increased Aura Area of Effect
Supported Auras do not affect you
Non-Curse Auras from Supported Skills have 40% increased Effect
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that grants accuracy and critical strike chance to you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 58% increased Critical Strike Chance
You and nearby allies gain +701 to Accuracy Rating
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: Foe Gyre
implicitMods: Minions have +15% to all Elemental Resistances
craftedMods: Non-Channelling Skills have -7 to Total Mana Cost
fracturedMods: Minions have 19% increased Attack and Cast Speed

name: Ashes of the Stars
explicitMods: +1 to Level of all Skill Gems
+30% to Quality of all Skill Gems
flavourText: A single facet contains the wisdom
of countless disintegrated worlds.

name: Bramble Lure
explicitMods: 1% chance to receive additional Blight items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
4% chance to receive additional Divination Card items when opening a Reward Chest in a Heist
Monsters have 8% chance to Duplicate dropped Rogue's Marker
53% Chance to Avoid being Stunned during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Chaos, Curse, Hex

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses all targets in an area, lowering their chaos resistance.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies have -30% to Chaos Resistance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports hex curse skills. Hexes from auras or cursed ground cannot transfer.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 34% increased Hex Transfer range
Hexes from Supported Skills Transfer to all Enemies within 3 metres when Hexed Enemy dies
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Consumes a corpse, granting all of your minions the power to block both attacks and spells. The skill consumes other nearby corpses, increasing the duration for each corpse consumed.
explicitMods: Additional 1.00 seconds Base Duration per extra corpse Consumed
Grants Minions +35% Chance to Block Attack Damage
Grants Minions +35% Chance to Block Spell Damage
Grants Minions 4% of Life Regenerated per Second if they have Blocked recently
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Desecrates the ground, spawning corpses based on monsters in the current area and dealing chaos damage over time to enemies. If you are using the Raise Spectre skill there is a chance to spawn spectral corpses matching your most recently raised Spectres. Spectral corpses cannot be interacted with except by Minion skills.
explicitMods: Deals 294 Base Chaos Damage per second
Spawned corpses' level matches the area level, up to a maximum of Level 80
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

flavourText: Seek not to avoid the mortal pains of this world.
In flagellation, there lies freedom from temptation.

hybrid.secDescrText: Applies a debuff to a specific enemy which signals your minions to consider that enemy to be the Prey. All minions from skills supported by any Predator Support will target that enemy. Only one enemy can be the Prey at a time. This skill cannot be used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill that hits enemies.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Animates a Ranged Weapon Item or Lingering Blade to fight by your side. You cannot animate unidentified Weapons. Will not animate weapons with 6 sockets. Cannot be used by Traps or Mines.

You and nearby allies are Immune to all Elemental Ailments
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Once activated, continuously spends mana to cause volleys of ethereal weapons rain from the sky around you, dealing damage to enemies they impact. Each Blade will target a separate enemy in the volley area if possible. Each enemy can only be hit once by each volley, even if multiple blades land near them. This skill cannot be triggered or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
explicitMods: A Volley of blades falls every 0.7 seconds
2% increased Volley frequency per 100 maximum Mana
5 Blades fall per Volley, which will then Linger in the ground
Maximum 40 Lingering Blades can be left in the ground at a time
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Enchants your shield with the power of storms, which lashes out to deal arcing lightning damage to attackers when you block them.
explicitMods: Buff grants +25% Chance to Block Spell Damage while holding a Shield

name: The Black Cane
explicitMods: Each Summoned Phantasm grants you Phantasmal Might
flavourText: Lead the army of the damned from the front.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports melee strike skills, causing them to also strike at extra targets simultaneously. The extra targets must be a minimum distance from the user. If supporting a minion attack skill, the minion's skills will not also strike extra targets. Cannot support Vaal skills or triggered skills.
explicitMods: Supported Strike Skills target 3 additional nearby Enemies
Extra Targets for Supported Skills can be found 30% further away
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.
flavourText: "I believe the Halls of the Dead are secretly a
training ground. One day, we will be called
forth to stand and fight against a great tide."

name: Nycta's Lantern
flavourText: Left in her tomb by the lynch mob,
the flame inside still blazed bright after her death,
and so did hers.

would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.
